name: Dhoodhi Peel Dosa
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Doodhi (zucchini) peel, very finely sliced
A small bunch of cilantro leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the rice in water overnight. Drain.
2. Transfer the drained rice to a bowl and grind it until it forms a thick, smooth paste.
3. Finely slice the green chiles, ginger, and cilantro leaves.
4. Add the sliced ingredients to the rice mixture along with sour buttermilk, coconut milk, and salt. Mix thoroughly to form batter.
5. Pour 2 tablespoons of batter onto a hot greased skillet or griddle, spreading it into thin circles.
6. Turn the dosa once to brown both sides.
7. Serve hot with chutney if desired.
Mark's Note: A vegetarian buttermilk can be made by adding 1 teaspoon lemon juice to 2 tablespoons soymilk.
